tests.title: Export HTML writes a self-contained artifact carrying the P1 witnesses
errors: Error: Export HTML artifact never appeared at /tmp/pandoc-preview-proof-runs/20260617T152036Z/p07-export-html/export-witness.html (result: {"success":false,"artifact":null,"exit_code":null,"stdout":"","stderr":"error: no plugin with id \"pandoc-html-export\" in the plugins dir"}). The generic plugin firewall did not discover/run the shipped pandoc-html-export export plugin against the real buffer.
